lines.en_lit: “Sin lies in waiting at the door” And what did Satan say said to him: Satan, on Yom Kippur, has no license to prosecute. From where Rami bar Ḥama said: The numerological value HaSatan is three hundred and sixty four: Three hundred and sixty-four days has license to prosecute. Yom Kippur, he has no license to prosecute.

MISHNA: Every day would remove from the altar at the crow of the rooster or adjacent to it, whether before it or after it, And on Yom Kippur from midnight And on the Festivals, the first watch. And the call of the rooster would not arrive until the courtyard was full with the Jewish people

GEMARA: We learned there, limbs that were forced off the altar before midnight, should return misuse of consecrated property from them. after midnight, should not return not misuse of consecrated property from them;
From where are these matters Rav said: One verse says: all night and he shall burn it, And one verse says: “All night…and he shall remove How divide Half of it for burning and half of it for removal

Rav Kahana raised an objection. Every day would remove the ashes from the altar at the crow of the rooster or adjacent to it, whether before it or after it, and on Yom Kippur from midnight, and on the Festivals the first watch.
